![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/689615e35208a16971fa35ff/007ad8a5-92ad-4901-ac6f-4c5a05cb4dd4/Vertical-Dots-4-imgg-gi3-j7wnc64q.png)

## **Fractional CTO Services for**  **AI Strategy & Implementation**

Bridge the gap between AI Experimentation and Enterprise-Scale Results.

**WHY YOUR BUSINESS CAN’T AFFORD TO SKIP A FRACTIONAL CTO**

**“ _Selecting the right talent today means not falling behind tomorrow”_**

Technology is no longer a support function—it is central to how organizations compete, deliver value, and grow. Yet many companies struggle to access senior-level tech leadership without committing to a full-time executive. The Fractional CTO model offers a powerful alternative: experienced strategic leadership, tailored to your needs and budget. This guide explores the role, impact, and measurable value of a Fractional CTO, with real-world data and insights from leading firms like McKinsey, Gartner, and CTOx.

A Fractional CTO is a part-time executive who brings the experience and insight of a full-time CTO, but on a flexible basis. They typically work with companies undergoing growth, restructuring, or tech transformation, and can lead initiatives like cloud migration, product modernization, cybersecurity strategy, or vendor realignment. Fractional CTOs partner with senior leadership to ensure technology directly supports business outcomes—without the fixed cost of a permanent hire.

Strategic Impact: Backed by Research

When to Engage a Fractional CTO

How the Engagement Works

Case Snapshot

Let’s Talk

# Strategic Impact: Backed by Research

According to McKinsey & Company, businesses with strong tech leadership are twice as likely to outperform their peers in revenue growth. A recent study by CTOx revealed that organizations using Fractional CTOs realized a 25% reduction in infrastructure costs and 30% faster time-to-market on major product initiatives. Further, Gartner’s CIO Agenda showed that 70% of digital transformation failures were due to lack of executive tech alignment—precisely what a CTO addresses.

Schedule a 15-minute strategy call to explore if this model is right for your organization.

[Contact M&A](https://www.jmillerandassociates.com/fractional-aicto)

[Contact M&A](https://www.jmillerandassociates.com/fractional-aicto)

web.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/services/product-development/cto-consulting/#content)

# Strategic Fractional CTO Services For Growing Companies

Gain the strategic technology leadership you need without the overhead of a full-time executive.

Our fractional chief technology officer solutions align your software development efforts with your core business objectives, driving sustainable business growth.

[Secure your strategic leadership](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/services/product-development/cto-consulting/#contact)

## High-Impact Leadership, Scaled to Your Needs

A fractional chief technology officer provides the same level of technical expertise and strategic guidance as a full-time executive, but on a part-time or project basis. This model allows growing companies to access elite technology leadership without the overhead of a permanent C-suite hire.

### Typical Engagement Structure

Our fractional CTO engagements are designed for flexibility and sustained momentum:

- **Commitment**: Equivalent to 1–3 days per week.
- **Duration**: Typically a 3-month to 6-month initial roadmap to ensure long-term business growth.

### Core Activities

When you hire a fractional CTO, they become an integrated part of your team, focusing on:

Lead Strategic Alignment
Architect Scalable Roadmaps
De-Risk the Infrastructure
Empower Leadership & Teams

![](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/background-1024x683.jpg)

#### Lead Strategic Alignment

We participate directly in board meetings and executive sessions to ensure every technology strategy is a direct engine for your corporate vision.

![](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/mvp-1.jpg)

#### Architect Scalable Roadmaps

We design technical roadmaps that build the foundation for long-term business growth.

![](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/dbp4.jpg)

#### De-Risk the Infrastructure

We audit architecture, vendor contracts, and security protocols to eliminate bottlenecks and protect your company from technical debt and security liabilities.

![](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/dbp3-1024x476.jpg)

#### Empower Leadership & Teams

We act as a trusted strategic advisor to the CEO and provide high-level mentorship to the tech team, elevating the entire organization’s technical expertise.

## Is Your Technology Strategy Keeping Up With Your Ambitions?

Many growing companies reach a tipping point where software development becomes a bottleneck rather than an engine for business growth. If you recognize these symptoms, it’s time to bring in strategic technology leadership.

![The Leadership Gap](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Group-1.svg)

#### The Leadership Gap

Whether you’re thinking, "We don't have a chief technology officer," or your current lead is stretched too thin, a fractional CTO provides the high-level technical expertise needed to own your roadmap. We step in to provide the strategic guidance that bridges the gap between your vision and your development team's execution.

![Execution and Alignment Problems](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/target-goal.svg)

#### Execution and Alignment Problems

Are projects slipping? Is there confusion between vendors and partners? Without a clear chief technology officer figure, engineering alignment suffers. We provide the fractional tech leadership necessary to establish technical decision authority, ensuring every sprint contributes to your business objectives.

![Growth and Transformation](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Promotion-Rocket.svg)

#### Growth and Transformation

Scaling a platform or coordinating multiple initiatives requires more than just more developers; it requires [robust technology strategies](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/technologies/). We help you navigate the complexity of scaling, providing the outsourced CTO services needed to manage multiple vendors and technical debt simultaneously.

![Post-Strategy Execution](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Documents-File-List.svg)

#### Post-Strategy Execution

Strategy is only as good as its implementation. If you’ve completed a high-level plan but lack the internal technology leadership to execute it, our fractional CTO services provide the ongoing governance and delivery oversight to turn that plan into a reality.

## Why Our Fractional CTO Model?  Strategy + Execution + Security

In a market saturated with high-level consultants and outsourced dev shops, our fractional CTO services stand apart by bridging the gap between executive vision and technical reality. We don’t just provide strategic guidance; we ensure your technology strategies are executed to perfection.

#### Our Key Differentiators

**Innovation at Speed (In-House Continuity):**

Unlike consulting firms that hand over a plan and disappear, we manage the entire lifecycle in-house. This ensures that your strategic technology leadership is directly connected to implementation and build, eliminating the “lost in translation” phase between strategy and code.

**Trust as Your Competitive Moa** **t:**

In today’s landscape, security cannot be an afterthought. We build security and oversight into your systems from day one. This ensures your platforms are inherently trustworthy, creating a sustainable competitive advantage and a defensive moat for your company.

**Compliance and Governance-First Approach:**

Most development partners focus solely on features, often ignoring the regulatory risks that can stall business growth. We provide the technical expertise to navigate complex compliance landscapes, mitigating risks that other providers simply don’t understand.

**Accelerated Market Competitiveness:**

The speed of innovation we enable allows you to stay ahead of the curve. By aligning your tech team with high-velocity software development frameworks, we turn your technology stack into a tool for market dominance.

##### **The Difference: One partner for accelerated business results.**

We combine strategic leadership, secure infrastructure, and flawless execution to deliver measurable results, not just technical documentation.

## Comprehensive Strategic Technology Leadership for Your Growth

When you hire a fractional CTO, you aren’t just getting an advisor; you are gaining a partner who takes full ownership of your technical ecosystem.

Our fractional CTO services are designed to provide the technical expertise required to align high-level business objectives with day-to-day software development.

#### Scope of the Offering

We provide end-to-end technology leadership across the following domains:

#### Technology Oversight

Continuous monitoring of your stack to ensure it supports current and future business growth.

#### Architecture Decision Governance

Implementing a framework for making high-stakes technical choices that [prevent technical debt](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/insights/technical-debt/).


#### Vendor Selection and Management

Leading RFP processes and managing third-party partners to ensure delivery quality.


#### Delivery and Program Oversight

[Driving software development velocity](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/services/product-development/) and ensuring projects meet their deadlines.


#### Engineering Organization Design

Structuring your internal teams and hiring processes for peak performance.



#### Executive and Board Reporting

Translating complex technical data into clear insights.



#### Core Deliverables

Our outsourced CTO services result in tangible assets that empower your leadership team:

#### Technology Roadmap and Priorities

A living document that aligns your technology strategies with your product vision.

#### Architecture Standards

A formal decision framework to maintain consistency across all platforms.

#### Delivery Performance Visibility

Clear dashboards and reporting on engineering health and velocity.

#### Vendor Oversight Reports

Regular audits and recommendations on third-party performance and costs.

#### Risk and Security Posture Guidance

Strategic advice on mitigating vulnerabilities and protecting your intellectual property.


#### Strategic Guidance & Executive Reporting

Monthly or weekly briefings designed for the CEO and board members.

## High-Impact Technology Leadership Built for Scale

Our fractional CTO engagement model is purpose-built to support the journey from high-growth startups to established enterprises.

We specialize in supporting organizations that are scaling rapidly but lack the internal chief technology officer presence to navigate complex technical hurdles.

### The Outcomes of Strategic Technology Leadership

When you hire a Fractional Chief AI Officer from Dualboot, you transform AI from a series of experiments into a core business capability:

- **Executive Ownership of AI:** Establish a fractional Chief AI Officer as a single point of accountability.
- **Alignment of Investments:** Tie AI initiatives directly to measurable business value.
- **Safe Enterprise Scaling:** Move beyond pilots to scale AI adoption with clear guardrails.
- **Risk Mitigation:** Reduce unmanaged risk through robust governance and oversight.
- **Board-Level Visibility:** Provide clear reporting on AI performance and roadmap progress.

#### Investment & Commitment

Quality fractional CTO services require more than just occasional advice; they require a seat at the table.

- **Tailored Engagement:** Designed to reflect the complexity of your roadmap and the specific impact required. Whether you need deep architectural oversight or high-level board advisory, we build a commitment model that scales with your needs.

- **Collaborative Approach:** We work closely with CEOs, COOs, and Private Equity sponsors to ensure transparency and strategic alignment.


### From Vision to Implementation: Scaling Your Technical Success

Bringing in a fractional CTO is often the first step in a deeper transformation. As your technology strategies evolve, our partnership can expand to ensure seamless execution across all levels of your organization.

![](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/dualbootpartners-4.jpg)

#### How We Grow With You

Our fractional CTO services are designed to lead into high-impact execution phases, including:

- #### Implementation Programs

After the roadmap is established, our fractional CTO oversees the implementation of new governance, security protocols, [DevOps practices, and automation](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/technologies/devops/) and engineering standards to ensure they are followed.
- #### Custom Builds

We provide the technology leadership needed to modernize organizations by managing complex software products and [AI development projects](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/services/ai-machine-learning/) from start to finish.
- #### Long-Term Strategic Partnership

Many clients hire a fractional CTO as a trusted advisor to the board for years, ensuring that business objectives and technical capabilities stay synchronized as the market shifts.

**Strategic Note**: We don’t just tell you what to do; we provide the technical expertise and strategic guidance to ensure it actually gets done.

## Secure Your Strategic Technology Roadmap Today

Don’t let a lack of technology leadership stall your momentum. Whether you are navigating a digital transformation or need to stabilize your software development lifecycle, our fractional CTO solutions provide the strategic guidance you need to succeed.

### Fractional CTO FAQs

What responsibilities does a fractional CTO role cover for a non-technical founder?

For non-technical founders, a fractional CTO acts as a strategic bridge. Their responsibilities include translating business goals into a technical roadmap, managing the tech team, and providing specialized expertise during critical decision-making. By providing high-level strategic leadership, they ensure the founder doesn’t have to manage the complexities of software development alone.

How do fractional CTO services differ from hiring a full-time technical leader?

The primary difference is flexibility. Fractional IT services provide the same caliber of technical expertise as a full-time executive but at a fraction of the cost. While a full-time chief technology officer is a permanent overhead, fractional CTO services allow you to scale involvement based on your current business objectives.


When should a startup hire fractional CTO support?

A startup should hire a fractional CTO when they reach a “complexity ceiling,” usually when the tech team lacks a clear roadmap or a digital transformation is required to scale. If your technology strategies are no longer aligned with your long-term business goals, bringing in strategic leadership is the most effective way to course-correct.

Can fractional CTO consulting firms help with vendor selection and cloud architecture decisions?

Yes. One of the highest-value aspects of outsourced CTO services is objective governance. A fractional chief technology officer brings specialized expertise to [audit cloud architecture](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/technologies/cloud/) and lead vendor selection, ensuring your fractional IT services ecosystem is cost-effective and technically sound.

Who typically benefits most from bringing on an on-demand Chief Technology Officer?

Growth-stage organizations ($20M–$500M revenue) undergoing digital transformation or those with a leadership gap benefit most. Whether it’s a CEO needing strategic guidance or a [Private Equity firm](https://www.dualbootpartners.com/industries/private-equity/) protecting an investment, a fractional CTO provides the technology leadership necessary to turn ambitious business goals into reality.

web.title: What's The Value of a Fractional Chief AI Officer - Faye Digital
web.description: A fractional chief AI officer is an executive-level leader who guides a company's AI strategy and early AI initiatives on a part-time or ...
web.markdown:
[Skip to Menu](https://fayedigital.com/blog/fractional-chief-ai-officer/#header-right-nav) [Skip to Content](https://fayedigital.com/blog/fractional-chief-ai-officer/#main-wrap)

![fractional chief ai officer img](https://fayedigital.com/wp-content/uploads/fractional-chief-ai-officer-img-1.png)

[Artificial intelligence (AI)](https://fayedigital.com/ai-services/) is becoming a core part of business operations. As AI expands, organizations are looking for ways to add AI experts or specialists to their technical and leadership teams. That’s where a fractional chief AI officer comes in.

A fractional AI officer gives organizations senior-level AI expertise on a flexible basis. They guide AI capabilities, help prioritize high-value AI projects, and set the strategic direction without the cost or commitment of a full-time hire.

In this article, we’ll take a deeper dive into what a fractional chief AI officer does. You’ll also learn what organizations can benefit most from this flexible leadership role, and how itcompares to similar AI positions in the marketplace.

## Why AI Leadership Matters More Than Ever

The pace of AI technologies is accelerating faster than most teams can keep up with. New AI tools and generative AI applications appear every month, creating pressure to move quickly while navigating growing [regulatory requirements](https://fayedigital.com/blog/ai-ethics-and-governance/) and expectations around ethical AI and risk management.

Inside many companies, early AI initiatives are happening, but without clear ownership or alignment to real business objectives. This leads to scattered experiments instead of a unified [AI strategy](https://fayedigital.com/blog/ai-strategy-importance/).

Because AI reshapes workflows, culture, and decision-making, it can’t be treated like a standard IT project. Organizations need dedicated AI leadership to set strategic direction and ensure investments actually support the company’s broader goals.

## What Does a Chief AI Officer (CAIO) Do?

A chief AI officer is responsible for defining an organization’s overall [AI strategy](https://fayedigital.com/blog/ai-strategy-consulting/) and ensuring that every major [AI initiative](https://fayedigital.com/ai-services/) supports the company’s broader business objectives. Unlike technical roles that focus on building models or deploying AI systems, a chief AI officer sets the company’s posture toward artificial intelligence, shapes how teams will use it, and determines where it can create the most value.

A chief AI officer oversees priorities such as [data governance](https://fayedigital.com/blog/ai-governance-framework/), ethical AI, and risk management, ensuring the organization adopts AI responsibly while staying compliant with evolving regulatory requirements. They also coordinate across departments, helping teams understand how to integrate AI capabilities into real workflows.

Even if companies haven’t made a formal hire, they often have someone undertaking many of these responsibilities. This is often the CEO, COO, CFO, or a team member who ends up making decisions about AI investments. Many of these leaders don’t have the time or the specialized [AI expertise](https://fayedigital.com/blog/ai-adoption-for-business/) required to guide transformation, which is why chief AI officer responsibilities are increasingly becoming a dedicated role.

## What Is a Fractional Chief AI Officer (Fractional CAIO)?

A fractional chief AI officer is an executive-level leader who guides a company’s [AI strategy](https://fayedigital.com/blog/ai-adoption-delay-risks/) and early AI initiatives on a part-time or contract basis.

Instead of hiring a full time executive, organizations get access to senior AI leadership that can define priorities, oversee [AI projects](https://fayedigital.com/blog/ai-agent-in-crm/), and shape the company’s overall posture toward artificial intelligence, without the cost or long-term commitment of a permanent chief AI officer.

A fractional AI officer focuses on identifying high-impact AI applications, aligning them with real business goals, and coordinating the teams responsible for implementation. They also work across departments to reduce fear and support bottom-up AI adoption, giving companies the strategic direction they need while they mature. It’s an approach that provides flexibility before most organizations are ready to hire a full time chief AI officer.

Why Hire a Fractional Chief AI Officer?

Companies hire a fractional chief AI officer because they need clear AI leadership and a strategic path forward, without the cost or commitment of a full time executive. Here are a few specific benefits of bringing a fractional chief AI officer to your team.

### Faster Time-to-Value

A fractional CAIO identifies a small number of high-value workflows where AI applications can improve [operational efficiency](https://fayedigital.com/software-process-optimizations/) almost immediately. Instead of long, unfocused projects, companies can see measurable results quickly.

Executive Leadership Without Full-Time Cost

Hiring a full chief AI officer is expensive, difficult, and often premature for organizations still figuring out their [AI strategy](https://fayedigital.com/blog/ai-strategy-importance/). A fractional chief AI officer gives companies access to senior AI leadership without the overhead of a full time executive.

### Better Cross-Department Alignment

AI efforts often stall because departments pursue separate AI initiatives without a shared plan. A fractional chief AI officer creates alignment by connecting projects across teams and linking them to a unified AI strategy.

### Better Pilots and Fewer Failed Experiments

Many AI projects fail because they lack clear scope, measurable outcomes, or buy-in from the teams expected to use them. Successful pilots start with processes where value can be quantified and where teams feel supported.

A fractional chief AI officer can help design pilots that are well-defined and tied directly to real business objectives. By setting the right expectations and providing the right structure, a fractional CAIO helps companies avoid wasted AI investments and ensures early wins translate into long-term progress.

### Culture, Change Management, and Fear Reduction

Introducing AI technologies changes how people feel about their jobs. Employees often worry AI will replace them, even when the goal is to improve operational efficiency and make teams more effective.

![fractional ai officer with the team](https://fayedigital.com/wp-content/uploads/fractional-ai-officer-with-the-team-1200x800.jpg)

A fractional AI officer helps leadership communicate a clear message: AI is here to augment people, not eliminate roles. By framing AI adoption as an investment in the team and involving employees, the fractional CAIO reduces resistance and builds the trust needed for lasting change.

## Full-Time CAIO vs Fractional CAIO: Key Differences

Hiring a full-time chief AI officer gives companies a dedicated leader to drive long-term transformation, but it also requires significant investment, a mature [AI strategy](https://fayedigital.com/blog/ai-strategy-importance/), and the internal resources to support a full AI function. Many smaller companies and mid-market organizations simply aren’t ready for that level of commitment.

A fractional chief AI officer offers a more practical model. Instead of paying for a full time executive, companies get focused AI leadership that can set strategic direction, guide early AI initiatives, and ensure safe AI integration across the organization. Fractional CAIOs bring flexibility, lower cost, and access to a wider pool of AI expertise, allowing companies to scale at their own pace.

Fractional Chief AI Officer vs AI Consultants

When companies [begin exploring AI initiatives](https://fayedigital.com/blog/generative-ai-workshop/), they often start by hiring an AI consultant. While this can be useful in specific situations, it does not replace the need for executive-level AI leadership.

For example, the freelance site Upwork is a popular spot to find AI consultants. An Upwork AI consultant might focus on tactical tasks such as building small automations or experimenting with AI applications. While an Upwork AI consultant might be useful for a one off project, they don’t own long-term [AI strategy](https://fayedigital.com/blog/ai-strategy-importance/) and aren’t responsible for aligning AI projects with core business objectives.

A fractional chief AI officer, on the other hand, provides ongoing leadership. They define a complete strategic roadmap and hold teams accountable. This is something that an Upwork AI consultant or a freelancer cannot do. For organizations that want real transformation, a fractional CAIO is the model that delivers both strategic direction and practical execution.

Which Companies Benefit Most from a Fractional AI Officer

A fractional chief AI officer is especially valuable for smaller companies and mid-market organizations that feel pressure to [adopt AI technologies](https://fayedigital.com/ai-services/) but aren’t ready to hire a full time executive to lead the effort. These companies often have strong IT teams, yet lack dedicated AI leadership to guide strategy and manage cross-department adoption.

The model is also a fit for organizations experimenting with AI projects that haven’t produced meaningful results. When pilots are scattered or disconnected from core business objectives, a fractional chief AI officer brings the structure needed to evaluate opportunities, create alignment, and focus resources where they matter most.

Even when a company has a CTO, that leader is usually focused on core infrastructure or product, not the strategic, organization-wide transformation required to integrate AI capabilities into daily operations. Fractional leadership gives these companies access to executive-level direction.

How to Evaluate a Fractional Chief AI Officer

Choosing the right fractional chief AI officer is less about technical depth and more about finding a leader who can connect AI initiatives to real business objectives. The strongest candidates understand both the technology and the human side of transformation.

Look for someone who has experience setting [AI strategy](https://fayedigital.com/blog/ai-strategy-importance/), [running workshops](https://fayedigital.com/ai-quickstart/) with executives, and prioritizing [AI projects based on measurable value](https://fayedigital.com/blog/ai-in-customer-service-automation/). They should be comfortable with data governance, ethical AI, and risk management, ensuring the company integrates AI responsibly and stays aligned with evolving regulatory requirements.

While technical expertise is certainly needed, companies should be weary of candidates who seem overly focused on tools or technical details. A great fractional chief AI officer thinks in terms of business outcomes and creating a larger cultural change. Ideally, they also bring access to a broader bench of AI expertise.

## When to Bring in a Fractional AI Officer

Organizations typically consider a fractional chief AI officer when AI interest is high, but internal direction is unclear. This often happens when teams are experimenting with AI initiatives, yet there is no unified AI strategy, no clear ownership, and no roadmap connecting those efforts to broader business objectives.

A fractional chief AI officer becomes valuable when leadership recognizes that AI will play a meaningful role in the company’s future, but the organization isn’t ready to hire a full time executive or build a dedicated AI function. This model provides strategic oversight and guidance on responsible AI integration at a pace that matches the company’s maturity.

It may also be the right time to bring in fractional leadership when teams are overwhelmed by new AI technologies or facing cultural resistance around adoption. A fractional CAIO helps set priorities and ensure early AI capabilities deliver measurable value while minimizing risk.

## Ready to Bring AI Into Your Business?

AI is reshaping how companies deliver value, but most organizations don’t have the structure or leadership needed to move from scattered experiments to a cohesive AI strategy. A fractional chief AI officer offers a practical path forward, providing the expertise, direction, and accountability needed to turn early AI initiatives into measurable outcomes.

If your organization is exploring how to adopt artificial intelligence, Faye can help you take the next step. Our [AI Services](https://fayedigital.com/ai-services/) team provides:

- **Fractional AI Officers** to guide strategy, prioritization, and responsible AI integration
- **AI Workshops** to educate teams, map opportunities, and build alignment

- **Faye Agent Portal:** A single, secure hub for all AI agents and models

Whether you’re just beginning to explore AI capabilities or looking to accelerate existing projects, Faye gives your organization the strategic support needed to adopt AI safely, effectively, and at the right pace.

If you’re ready to bring structure and real-world impact to your AI journey, [**our team is here to help you get started**](https://fayedigital.com/ai-services/).

![cropped jason green.jpeg](https://fayedigital.com/wp-content/uploads/cropped-jason-green-120x120.jpeg)

By Jason Green, President and Chief AI Strategy Officer

Jason Green is a serial entrepreneur with a rare blend of technical expertise, business acumen, and standout communication skills. With over two decades of experience, Jason has founded companies, raised capital, and led successful exits, all the while architecting and engineering multiple software applications.

Jason Green is a serial entrepreneur with a rare blend of technical expertise, business acumen, and standout communication skills. With over two decades of experience, Jason has founded companies, raised capital, and led successful exits, all the while architecting and engineering multiple software applications. As a recognized thought leader in CRM and Customer Experience, he has delivered transformative solutions for mid-market firms, Fortune 500 companies, and government agencies. Jason currently serves as the President of Faye, a global software and services company specializing in CRM, CX, productivity tools, and managed services. Under his leadership, Faye helps leading brands drive growth through innovative software solutions and expert implementation. Jason’s unique perspective and extensive background, allows him to bridge technology and strategy, empowering organizations to scale with clarity and confidence.

web.title: Fractional CTO for SaaS & AI Startups | Sharp Logica
web.description: Fractional CTO services for SaaS and AI startups. Get senior technical leadership to scale faster, reduce tech debt, and ship without a full-time CTO.
web.markdown:
Strategic Technology Leadership

# Fractional CTO for B2B, SaaS & AI Companies

Get senior CTO-level guidance to design, build, and scale your SaaS or AI product - without the cost or commitment of a full-time CTO. Fractional CTO services that combine deep [architecture](https://www.sharplogica.com/services#Architecture) expertise with practical product execution.

Led by a hands-on software architect with 30+ years of experience and a PhD in Computer Science, we help founders turn messy codebases and unclear roadmaps into scalable, well-designed platforms that investors and customers can trust.

[Schedule a Discovery Call](https://www.sharplogica.com/book-call)

![Fractional CTO Services](https://www.sharplogica.com/images/Fractional-CTO.webp)

Partnership Opportunities

## We Also Partner With Organizations Serving Our Target Market

### If you support companies navigating growth, transformation, or high-stakes technical decisions, we provide independent due diligence, architectural clarity, and fractional CTO leadership to strengthen your client engagements.

### Private Equity & Investors

Technical diligence for M&A and investment decisions, including architecture reviews, scalability assessments, risk analysis, and fractional CTO support for portfolio companies during post-deal execution.

[Download Service Overview PDF](https://websitegenstorage.blob.core.windows.net/pubdownloads/Flier_PE.pdf)

### Consulting Firms & Boutiques

Senior architecture and technical leadership you can embed into your client engagements - from rescuing troubled projects to validating architectures, guiding modernisation efforts, or advising executives on technology strategy.

[Download Service Overview PDF](https://websitegenstorage.blob.core.windows.net/pubdownloads/Flier_Consulting.pdf)

### Product Studios & Agencies

CTO-level oversight for complex client builds - ensuring strong architectural foundations, delivery discipline, and stakeholder alignment so your teams can execute confidently and consistently.

[Download Service Overview PDF](https://websitegenstorage.blob.core.windows.net/pubdownloads/Flier_Studios.pdf)

What is a Fractional CTO?

## Executive Technology Leadership — When You Need It, How You Need It

A Fractional CTO gives you high-level technical leadership without the cost or commitment of a full-time executive. Whether you're launching a new product, scaling your platform, or aligning tech with business strategy, we provide the senior expertise to guide your vision — on your terms

### Strategic

Technology decisions aligned with business goals and long-term product growth

### Flexible

Part-time or project-based leadership that adapts to your evolving needs

### Cost-Effective

Executive-level expertise at a fraction of the cost of a full-time hire

### Experienced

Executive-level expertise at a fraction of the cost of a full-time hire.

Fractional CTO Services

## Who Our Fractional CTO Services Are For

Sharp Logica works best with founders and leadership teams who already have or are building a software product and need expert technology leadership, not just more developers.

- ✔️ B2B SaaS startups preparing for Seed, Series A, or growth rounds
- ✔️ Established software companies that outgrew their initial [architecture](https://www.sharplogica.com/services#Architecture)
- ✔️ Teams adding **AI features** to an existing SaaS platform
- ✔️ Non-technical founders who need a trusted technical decision-maker

### Perfect Timing

- Startups preparing for scaling
- Companies needing [architecture](https://www.sharplogica.com/services#Architecture) oversight
- Teams requiring technical leadership
- Organizations adopting new technologies
- Founders needing technical validation
- Companies preparing for fundraising

When Should You Hire a Fractional CTO?

## Perfect for Growing Companies at Critical Junctures

### Startups Preparing for Scale

You're a founder with a product idea but need technical guidance to build the right [architecture](https://www.sharplogica.com/services#Architecture) from the start.

### Companies Needing Technical Direction

Your engineering team is growing and you need strategic oversight to maintain code quality and architecture.

### Organizations Adopting New Technologies

You want to integrate AI, migrate to cloud, or modernize your tech stack but need expert guidance.

What We Deliver

## Comprehensive Technology Leadership

From strategic planning to hands-on technical guidance, we provide the leadership your technology team needs to succeed.

### Tech Strategy & Roadmapping

Define the right technical path from MVP to scale with clear milestones and business alignment.

### [Architecture](https://www.sharplogica.com/services\#Architecture) Oversight

Design future-proof, maintainable systems that can scale with your business growth.

### Team Building & Mentoring

Help hire, evaluate, and mentor developers to build a strong engineering culture.

### CTO Services

- Technical strategy and roadmapping
- Architecture design and review
- Team building and technical interviews
- Technology selection and evaluation
- AI integration and automation solutions
- Cloud architecture and scalability planning
- Security and compliance guidance
- Fundraising technical due diligence

Why Work With SharpLogica

## Delivering Tangible Business Growth  Through Strategic Technology Leadership

### With a proven track record of driving measurable results, our fractional CTO services empower businesses to scale faster, reduce technical debt, and build sustainable, high-performance tech foundations

### Reduce Time to Market by 40%

Leverage expert technical strategy and optimized [architecture](https://www.sharplogica.com/services#Architecture) to expedite your product’s journey from concept to launch.

### Cut Tech Debt by 60%

By establishing clear technical leadership and best practices, we reduce technical debt, freeing up resources for growth and innovation.

### Effortless Scaling for Sustainable Growth

Build scalable solutions that grow seamlessly with your business, from MVP to enterprise-grade systems.

### Why Choose Our Fractional CTO Services?

**30+ years of experience** in enterprise software development and architecture.

**Proven track record** of helping companies scale from startup to enterprise.

**Business-focused approach** that aligns technology decisions with business goals.

#### Strategic

High-level technical direction aligned with business objectives.

#### Experienced

Decades of enterprise software development expertise.

#### Flexible

Part-time commitment that scales with your needs.

#### Results-Driven

Focus on measurable business outcomes and growth.

FAQ

## Frequently Asked Questions about Fractional CTO Services

### What does a Fractional CTO do?

A Fractional CTO provides the same kind of technology leadership as a full-time CTO — setting architecture direction, reviewing key technical decisions, mentoring engineers, and aligning the roadmap with business goals — but on a part-time, flexible basis.

### How is a Fractional CTO different from a consultant?

Traditional consultants deliver reports. As a Fractional CTO we stay involved: joining leadership meetings, reviewing pull requests and architecture designs, and helping you execute decisions over weeks and months, not just a single workshop.

### Which types of companies get the most value?

B2B SaaS and AI product companies between pre-seed and Series B typically benefit the most, especially when they have an engineering team in place but no seasoned CTO to lead it.

## Ready to Scale Your Technology?

Let's discuss how fractional CTO services can help you build scalable, maintainable technology that grows with your business.

[Schedule a Discovery Call](https://www.sharplogica.com/book-call)

Or reach us at: [info@sharplogica.com](mailto:info@sharplogica.com)

Why choose Fractional AI?

Your partner for AI transformation

We help businesses turn AI from an experiment into a competitive advantage. Whether automating internal processes or building AI-powered products, we deliver bespoke gen AI solutions that drive measurable results. Our elite San Francisco engineering team works hand-in-hand with companies to tackle their highest-value AI projects—driving efficiency, unlocking new revenue streams, and solving problems that off-the-shelf tools can't.

# AI solutions built for you

[For Enterprise](https://www.fractional.ai/enterprises) [For Private Equity](https://www.fractional.ai/private-equity)

Discover why enterprises and private equity firms rely on us as their trusted AI partner

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660bf72182cac0a3586068f6/66ce03914ebcd7696b53e761_MT_Fractional%20AI.jpeg)

Michel Tricot

CEO & Co-Founder at Airbyte

AI Assist in the builder was a huge milestone for our 1.0 launch! As many of you know, going from Prototype to Live when dealing with LLMs is a challenge for many companies.

On our side we worked alongside Fractional AI to get this amazing product live :)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660bf72182cac0a3586068f6/66ce023c488c643e8bd7689b_NW_Fractional%20AI.jpg)

Nathaniel Whittemore

CEO at Superintelligent

Have been collaborating with these guys on something I get to share soon and HIGHLY recommend them!

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660bf72182cac0a3586068f6/6909aae645f7117e4632c6ac_1652111378342.jpeg)

Diego Panama

President and COO at LogicGate

LogicGate has ambitious plans to power our platform and the GRC industry with AI, and Fractional AI is an invaluable partner helping us realize those ambitions. Their expert technical team serves a crucial ally, helping us refine our AI product strategy and continuously educating our employees, all of which enables us to remain the leading AI-powered enterprise GRC platform.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660bf72182cac0a3586068f6/68ec84524691622a6d92eade_1538521504080.jpeg)

Dan Cardinal

CTO at Beghou

Fractional AI's collaboration with our internal AI and software engineering teams was instrumental in helping us accelerate our timeline and expand our skillset. What we built together will streamline engineering workflows and deliver tailored, tech-enabled solutions to clients faster.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660bf72182cac0a3586068f6/68deaaad1a00fe5d6b0776e9_1739847548942.jpeg)

Fernando Schwartz, PhD

SVP, Chief AI Officer at Claritev

Fractional AI helped us further develop our AI roadmap in line with our ambitious vision and analyzed the readiness of our technical architecture to execute on the roadmap. Their hands-on experience was evident in their practical recommendations.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660bf72182cac0a3586068f6/684b0de350c627f419197bab_profile.png)

John Feddersen

Founder & CEO at Aurora Energy Research

We brought in Fractional AI as part of our diligence process to assess and articulate the implications of generative AI on our business and market. I appreciated their ability to bridge deep technical expertise with commercial instincts, resulting in practical recommendations grounded in hands-on-keyboard experience. They were an invaluable partner throughout the transaction process.

‍

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660bf72182cac0a3586068f6/677b2233dc3715c4813a2943_1543524476946.jpeg)

James Lehnhoff

CTO at Datasite

With Fractional AI's thought partnership and expertise, we’re taking our AI capabilities to the next level and revolutionizing our industry. Their collaboration has strengthened our product suite and enabled transformative advancements in our AI strategy.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660bf72182cac0a3586068f6/6737b1a96f8a36dffd96b665_1516255604586.jpg)

Danny Moldovan

Co-Founder at Change.org

FractionalAI has been invaluable in leveling up our internal gen AI automations. Their team took the time to thoroughly understand our unique issues and requirements, then applied their AI expertise to our content moderation workflows, significantly boosting our system’s accuracy and efficiency. They packaged their custom built solution in a flexible, API-driven component, enabling seamless deployment. I just hired them again, this time to build automations to support my PR team.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660bf72182cac0a3586068f6/66e096215501ff001934a48b_Ian.jpeg)

Ian Meyers

Co-Founder at Sincera

We had a tough AI problem that we wanted to solve quickly and systematically. Fractional AI was an incredible thought partner that embedded seamlessly with our team.

Not only were we able to solve our immediate challenge our team leveled up our own AI skills for the future.

API Integration Builder Agent

## Check out some of our AI projects

Zapier

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660bf72182cac0a3586068f6/66c7880ffbf65d0726384d7b_04e93a80-4e45-4b65-b142-127d5c242418_connect-logo-zapier.png)

Reducing Hallucinations by Over 80%

Zapier built an AI integration builder but its performance was a black box. Fractional AI partnered with Zapier to take their AI system to the next level.

[Read More](https://www.fractional.ai/case-study/the-power-of-llm-evals-how-fractional-ai-partnered-with-zapier-to-reduce-hallucinations-by-over-80)

Airbyte

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660bf72182cac0a3586068f6/66684410bfe44c76d77977a5_6667bf99a7bfefb0f268b0d0_image%203.png)

10x’ing the Speed of Building Connectors

Airbyte’s users spent hours manually building API integrations. Fractional AI cut the process to just minutes with an AI-powered connector builder.

[Read More](https://www.fractional.ai/case-study/api-integrations-in-minutes-how-fractional-ai-airbyte-10xd-the-speed-of-building-connectors)

Change.org

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660bf72182cac0a3586068f6/66684394c3de94403824008f_6667bf99e842c6a7263e8b62_image%203%20(2).png)

Automating Content Moderation

Change.org needed an affordable way to review thousands of daily user posts. Fractional AI built an AI-driven content moderation system, boosting accuracy and cutting costs.

[Read More](https://www.fractional.ai/case-study/how-fractional-ai-automated-content-moderation-for-change-org)

## Grounded in engineering   excellence

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660bf72182cac0a358606886/67365e90903bad082c624d76_Group%2084.png)

### Top San Francisco-based talent

We are a team of veteran engineers, bringing together the AI expertise and full-stack engineering skills to get your project into production.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660bf72182cac0a358606886/67365e904387c25cd892e969_Group%2086.png)

### End-to-end AI transformation

We prepare your company for an AI future, where trillions of dollars will be unlocked through bespoke AI workflow automations.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660bf72182cac0a358606886/67365e90fab2aa0e8aed00d6_Group%2087.png)

### Real impact, not just flashy demos

We build production-grade AI solutions that scale with your company’s growth, closing the gap from proof of concept to real-world impact.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/660bf72182cac0a358606886/67365ea3617919f0e850d2d5_Group%2085.png)

### Tested applied AI expertise

We’ve seen hundreds of AI projects, enabling us to de-risk your project, accelerate delivery, and leverage the latest techniques to deliver value.

## Get AI into production

Most AI projects never cross the finish line. But at Fractional AI, 100% of our projects are currently in production or on track for production deployment.

[Get Started](https://www.fractional.ai/#)

web.title: Fractional CTO / AI Strategy Council
web.description: Seeking a senior technology leader to advise on AI product decisions, providing guidance on design reviews, threat models, and strategy ...
web.markdown:
### This job posting is closed

This position was closed 13 days ago ago and is no longer accepting applications.

[View Live Jobs](https://www.gofractional.com/jobs)

## Job Description

**Who You Are**

You are a senior technology leader (CTO / Head of AI / Distinguished Engineer) who wants to advise high-impact AI product decisions. You provide concise, high-leverage guidance — design reviews, threat models, eval audits, ADRs and playbooks — and can move between strategy and technical detail. You are experienced in shipping AI at scale, communicating clearly, and delivering artifacts that leaders act upon.

You share your experience in Ai development, Ai strategy, scalable Ai production systems to form strategies, and accelerate the company’s AI roadmap and de‑risk decision making.

**Your Experience Includes**

- LLM & Multi-Agent Systems (safety, evals, retrieval, tool-use, orchestration, cost/latency engineering)
- MLOps & Data Platforms (feature stores, pipelines, governance, labeling/feedback loops)
- AI in Regulated Health (privacy, DPIA/TRA, clinical safety, audit trails)
- SRE/Cloud Economics (SLOs, incident mgmt, cost/perf tradeoffs)
- Security & Privacy (threat modeling for AI systems, secrets mgmt, data minimization)
- Product & Growth (AI monetization, pricing, usage metering, partner integrations)

**Your Responsibilities**

- Provide clear advice-to-decision paths for new and extending projects. You propose or review Ai strategy, and implementation pathways.
- Reference architectures, playbooks, and guardrail policies; risk registers; buy/build/partner matrices; vendor RFPs.
- Quality checks

**Requirements** **Must-have qualifications**

- 10+ yrs; prior CTO/Head of AI/Distinguished Ai Eng; shipped AI at scale; strong communication.
- Extensive proof of Python & FAST API projects, utilising extensive LLM APIs in production systems
- Scaled Ai/ML systems above 1M users
- Handled (managed and built) complex data pipelines

**Nice-to-have**

- Experience in regulated healthcare or clinical AI (privacy frameworks, DPIA, compliance, audit requirements).
- Prior advisory, fractional, consulting, or board-level support experience for engineering or AI teams.

**Compensation** Hourly Rate

Engagement term: Typically 6–12 months with flexible scope and deliverables.

**Payment & contractor terms** Independent Contractor status only. Payment in USD via Wise or bank direct deposit. Hourly invoicing. No employee benefits.

## About the Company

We are a global AI-first technology and services group building precision AI products across health, wellbeing, education, human performance and enterprise infrastructure. We move fast, prioritize safety and reliability, and use expert judgement plus tooling to de-risk decisions and accelerate product outcomes.

## Similar Jobs

[View Lead Data Architect](https://www.gofractional.com/job/the-recover-initiative-lead-data-architect)

### Lead Data Architect

[The ReCover Initiative](https://www.gofractional.com/companies/recoverinitiative-ca)

Remote•$145-$195/hr

[View NetSuite Developer](https://www.gofractional.com/job/everything-hr-fractional-netsuite-developer)

### NetSuite Developer

[Everything HR](https://www.gofractional.com/companies/everythinghr-com)

Santa Monica, CA•$90-$125/hr

[View Freelance Motion Graphic Designer](https://www.gofractional.com/job/nbcuniversal-freelance-motion-graphic-designer-3758)

web.title: What does a fractional CTO do? - Agathon
web.description: A fractional AI CTO provides strategic guidance and technical leadership to help organizations assess, plan, and responsibly implement AI solutions.
web.markdown:
- [Home](https://agathon.ai/)
- [Services](https://agathon.ai/services)
- [Case Studies](https://agathon.ai/case-studies)
- [Training](https://agathon.ai/training)
- [Insights](https://agathon.ai/insights)

[Contact](https://agathon.ai/contact)

Nov 2024

# What does a fractional CTO do?

A fractional AI CTO provides strategic guidance and technical leadership to help organizations assess, plan, and responsibly implement AI solutions.

![What does a fractional CTO do?](https://agathon.ai/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fpub-110b4a45c438457bb2704540d15bf1ed.r2.dev%2Fcharlesdeluvio-Lks7vei-eAg-unsplash.jpg&w=1920&q=75)

In today's rapidly evolving tech landscape, many companies want to leverage artificial intelligence but can't justify hiring a full-time AI executive. Enter the fractional AI CTO – a part-time strategic leader who helps organizations navigate the complex world of AI implementation and governance.

[**Core Responsibilities**](https://agathon.ai/insights/what-does-a-fractional-cto-do#core-responsibilities) [**Strategic Planning and Assessment**](https://agathon.ai/insights/what-does-a-fractional-cto-do#strategic-planning-and-assessment)

A fractional AI CTO typically begins by evaluating a company's existing technical infrastructure and business objectives. They identify opportunities where AI can create genuine value, rather than implementing AI for AI's sake. This includes:

- Assessing data readiness and infrastructure needs
- Identifying high-impact use cases
- Developing realistic AI roadmaps aligned with business goals

[**Technical Leadership**](https://agathon.ai/insights/what-does-a-fractional-cto-do#technical-leadership)

While not always hands-on with coding, fractional AI CTOs [provide crucial technical direction](https://agathon.ai/insights/common-technical-challenges-fractional-ctos-solve-for-startups):

- Selecting appropriate AI technologies and frameworks
- Establishing development standards and best practices
- Evaluating and choosing between build vs. buy decisions
- Ensuring responsible AI development practices

[**Team Building and Management**](https://agathon.ai/insights/what-does-a-fractional-cto-do#team-building-and-management)

Even working part-time, these leaders play a vital role in shaping the AI team:

- Helping hire and evaluate AI talent
- Mentoring existing technical staff
- Creating training programs to upskill teams
- Managing relationships with AI vendors and consultants

[**Risk Management and Governance**](https://agathon.ai/insights/what-does-a-fractional-cto-do#risk-management-and-governance)

A critical part of the role involves [managing AI-related risks](https://agathon.ai/insights/ai-governance-what-business-leaders-need-to-know):

- Developing AI governance frameworks
- Ensuring ethical AI deployment
- Addressing data privacy concerns
- Monitoring regulatory compliance

[**The Advantages of Going Fractional**](https://agathon.ai/insights/what-does-a-fractional-cto-do#the-advantages-of-going-fractional)

The fractional model offers several benefits:

1. Cost-effectiveness for companies not ready for a full-time AI executive
2. Access to experienced leadership without the overhead
3. Flexibility to scale involvement based on project needs
4. External perspective from someone working across multiple organizations

[**Who Needs a Fractional AI CTO?**](https://agathon.ai/insights/what-does-a-fractional-cto-do#who-needs-a-fractional-ai-cto)

This model works particularly well for:

- Mid-sized companies beginning their AI journey
- Startups looking to build AI capabilities
- Traditional businesses undergoing AI transformation
- Organizations needing expert guidance for specific AI initiatives

The role of a fractional AI CTO is evolving as rapidly as AI technology itself. The best practitioners combine [deep technical knowledge with business acumen](https://agathon.ai/insights/why-ai-startups-need-a-different-kind-of-cto-and-what-that-looks-like), helping organizations navigate the opportunities and challenges of AI adoption while maintaining a realistic and practical approach to implementation.

**Ready to explore how AI can transform your business?**

Building AI capabilities without a full-time executive requires strategic leadership in data readiness assessment, technical framework selection, and AI governance—precisely what our fractional CTO service delivers.

If your mid-sized company or startup is beginning an AI transformation journey, we should talk.

- Email us to discuss how we can evaluate your technical infrastructure and develop a realistic AI roadmap aligned with your business objectives.
- Book an initial consultation if you're ready to implement sophisticated AI governance frameworks and make strategic build-vs-buy decisions with executive-level technical guidance.

[Email us](https://agathon.ai/contact) [Book an initial consultation](https://agathon.ai/contact)

## Related services

[Fractional CTO](https://agathon.ai/services/fractional-cto)

Executive technical leadership across all technology decisions

[AI Leadership Advisory](https://agathon.ai/services/ai-leadership-advisory)

Build internal AI capability and strategic thinking

## Read more

![Common technical challenges fractional CTOs solve for startups](https://agathon.ai/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fpub-110b4a45c438457bb2704540d15bf1ed.r2.dev%2Fkaleidico-3V8xo5Gbusk-unsplash.webp&w=828&q=75)

#### [Common technical challenges fractional CTOs solve for startups](https://agathon.ai/insights/common-technical-challenges-fractional-ctos-solve-for-startups)

Fractional CTOs provide expert technical leadership to startups, addressing critical challenges like technical debt, scaling infrastructure, security, and cloud cost optimisation without the need for a full-time hire.

![The fractional CTO's guide to building AI teams that deliver](https://agathon.ai/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fpub-110b4a45c438457bb2704540d15bf1ed.r2.dev%2F5a65ca27ac512f1b0ea52023dfdf162e_0.webp&w=828&q=75)

#### [The fractional CTO's guide to building AI teams that deliver](https://agathon.ai/insights/the-fractional-ctos-guide-to-building-ai-teams-that-deliver)

The Fractional CTO's Guide highlights the crucial role of fractional CTOs in building high-performing AI teams that align with business objectives while fostering innovation and ethical practices.

![Hiring a fractional head of AI to complement your existing technical team](https://agathon.ai/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fpub-110b4a45c438457bb2704540d15bf1ed.r2.dev%2F0698ed1730dfa94ae42f23dd42f9868a_0.webp&w=828&q=75)

#### [Hiring a fractional head of AI to complement your existing technical team](https://agathon.ai/insights/hiring-a-fractional-head-of-ai-to-complement-your-existing-technical-team)

A fractional Head of AI bridges the critical gap between technical expertise and strategic AI leadership, enabling organisations to unlock their AI potential without the overhead of a full-time executive.
